Client called and left VM saying that Amanda called her to tell her she had to pay the full amount. She said she wasnt prepared. I called her back and it went straight to VM. Left the following text...

This is DC Lash Bar. We understand you had scheduled a correction after being dissatisfied with your 3/21 service and that you were incorrectly scheduled for early May. Typically, corrections need to be done within a 5 day window after service. I believe we originally extended the window as a courtesy, however with tomorrow being May 12, it is almost 7 weeks after your original service. This would be a normal lift and tint service since the prior work is now gone. But, to make up for the inconvenience, we are offering 50% off the service tomorrow. Would you like to keep the appointment at the 50% off discount or would you like to cancel?

5/11/23 client has been emailing to schedule a correction from 3/21. Someone responded to say that was fine on May 3. Then someone to schedule it on May 8. This is our fault for not telling client that it is way past the time she can schedule a correction. I left a vm on 5/11 to tell her that at this point, it is really a Lift&Tint. If client complains that this should have been a correction at no charge, explain that corrections need to be done within 5 days of service, but that we were not clear about that when we originally emailed. As a result, we would like to offer her 50% off today's Lift & Tint for the misunderstanding. AH
3/21/23 offered 10% discount because she had a wait over 15 mins. AH
